text_block_list.text:
After arriving at the cafeteria for<n>lunch, I notice
Yukino Bijin staring<n>absentmindedly at the menu.
choice_data_list: You're really burning a hole into that menu there.
You're really burning a hole into that menu there.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! That's not what I'm try'n to<n>do!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
There's an extra large soba on the<n>menu for a
limited time only, and it<n>r'minded me of the wanko
soba back<n>home...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did you say... wanko soba?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If I remember correctly, you're fromMorioka, right? The birthplace ofwanko soba... Gulp...
choice_data_list: (She looks like she's about to explode...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Cool it, Oguri! You're scarin' 'em!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I just can't stop thinking about<n>wanko
soba... Could you tell me more<n>about the real deal?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Gee whillikers, sure... But I'm no<n>afici'nado, mind
you. I've only ever<n>been on refill duty.
choice_data_list:
Refill duty? You mean dishing out more noodles
each time the customer's bowl is empty?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Righty-roo! It's quite fun. You pour in<n>a bite-sized
serving of soba and say<n>"heeere ya go" or
"heeere it comes."

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't great at the start, so the lady<n>at the
restaurant had to keep helping<n>me out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's all fascinating... So, Yukino, if I<n>ask you for
some wanko soba, will<n>you serve some up?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
As if, ya doink head! She just said<n>she was only a
refiller!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I can't make it m'self, but the<n>wanko soba
from Morioka's really<n>tasty!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
We've got lotsa other foods 'n fun<n>things too, so
you should definitely<n>visit!
choice_data_list: Now I want some wanko soba too.
Now I want some wanko soba too.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
We've got lotsa other foods 'n fun<n>things too, so
you should definitely<n>visit!
choice_data_list: Now I want some wanko soba too.
Now I want some wanko soba too.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... There's a famous<n>festival called
the Morioka Sansa<n>Odori.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's got taiko drums, flutes, and<n>people danc'n
down the street in a<n>p'rade!
choice_data_list: That must take a heck of a lot of prep work.
That must take a heck of a lot of prep work.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but all that prep made for a darn<n>good
workout, so I actually enjoyed<n>it!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in town treated me super<n>kindly, like I
was their granddaughter.<n>It was a lotta fun help'n
out with the<n>preparations!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a real nice place. Is that<n>what your
hometown's like too,<n>Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I remember when Tome and the<n>others
taught me the Kasamatsu Ondo<n>dance... I hope
everyone's doing<n>okay.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I miss my hometown too... Maybe I'll<n>write
ever'one sometime.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I want to send a letter filled with good<n>news, so I'll
hafta train hard!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Same. But to train hard, first I have to<n>sufficiently
fill my belly.

Their love for their hometowns helps<n>motivate
them to train harder.

I'm made doubly aware of this once<n>when I hear
Oguri Cap's stomach<n>grumbling.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What a coincidence! Me too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's a wanko soba rest'rant<n>round here.
D'ya want me to take ya<n>there?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's owned by the lady who showed<n>me the ropes
as a refiller back home,<n>so I can vouch for the
qual'ty and<n>flavors!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Jinkies, her soba always hits<n>the spot!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I could go on eating this<n>forever...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... So this is what authentic<n>wanko soba
tastes like.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like you're runn'n short on<n>refills.
Wouldja like me to lend a hand<n>with the serving?

text_block_list.name: Older Lojista Lady
text_block_list.text:
Wouldja, Yukino? I know you're here<n>as a
customer 'n all, but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Sure! Leave the refill'n to me!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Heeere ya go! Heeere it comes!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I swear, Oguri, you've got a black<n>hole in place of
your stomach. I know<n>it's all-you-can-eat here, but
go easy<n>on 'em, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Older Lojista Lady
text_block_list.text:
S'no problem at all! Seeing my<n>customers eat'n
plenty and leav'n<n>satisfied is what makes me
happy.

text_block_list.name: Older Lojista Lady
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Yukino! Why, you're a bona<n>fide refill'r
now!

text_block_list.name: Older Lojista Lady
text_block_list.text:
You use to be just a tiny kid carry'n<n>around the
serv'n tray. Everyone'd<n>be so worried watch'n
ya.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Awww, c'mon now! Shucks.

Yukino Bijin continues refilling Oguri<n>Cap's bowl
until she's full... I guess<n>this ended up being a
good training<n>session for everyone.
